name: Greek Potato and Chickpea Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender or food processor, combine olive oil, lemon juice, anchovy filets, oregano, parsley, yogurt, garlic, hard-boiled egg, salt, and pepper. Blend until well combined.
2. Wash and quarter the potatoes. Place them in a medium-sized saucepan and cover with water. Bring to a boil over high heat, then lower the heat and simmer for about 10 minutes, or until tender. Drain well and place in a salad bowl.
3. Pour half of the vinaigrette over the warm potatoes and toss to combine. Set aside to cool at room temperature.
4. When the potatoes have cooled, add cooked chick-peas, crumbled feta cheese, pitted Calamata olives, diced red onion, and diced tomato. Stir in the remaining vinaigrette and serve at room temperature.
